input.sql: SELECT u.certificate_number, u.password, (SELECT o.amount FROM t_account_bak o WHERE o.certificate_number=u.certificate_number) amount FROM t_account u, t_account_bak c WHERE u.certificate_number = c.certificate_number and u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number, u.plain_password AS password, (SELECT o.plain_amount AS amount FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak o WHERE o.`plain_certificate_number`=u.`plain_certificate_number`) amount FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account u, `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak c WHERE u.`plain_certificate_number` = c.`plain_certificate_number` and u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, o.certificate_number FROM (SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account) o, t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.certificate_number AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.`cipher_amount` AS amount, u.`plain_password` AS password, o.certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM (SELECT plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account) o, `encrypt_ds`.t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.`plain_certificate_number` AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, o.certificate_number FROM (SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account_bak) o, t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.certificate_number AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.`cipher_amount` AS amount, u.`plain_password` AS password, o.certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM (SELECT plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak) o, `encrypt_ds`.t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.`plain_certificate_number` AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT o.certificate_number FROM (SELECT a.certificate_number FROM t_account a) o

output.sql: SELECT o.certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM (SELECT a.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a) o

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, o.certificate_number FROM (SELECT a.* FROM t_account a) o, t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.certificate_number AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.`cipher_amount` AS amount, u.`plain_password` AS password, o.certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM (SELECT a.`account_id`, a.`plain_certificate_number` AS `certificate_number`, a.`plain_password` AS `password`, a.`cipher_amount` AS `amount_CIPHER` FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a) o, `encrypt_ds`.t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.`plain_certificate_number` AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, o.certificate_number FROM (SELECT * FROM t_account) o, t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.certificate_number AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.`cipher_amount` AS amount, u.`plain_password` AS password, o.certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM (SELECT `encrypt_ds`.t_account.`account_id`, `encrypt_ds`.t_account.`plain_certificate_number` AS `certificate_number`, `encrypt_ds`.t_account.`plain_password` AS `password`, `encrypt_ds`.t_account.`cipher_amount` AS `amount_CIPHER` FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account) o, `encrypt_ds`.t_account u WHERE o.certificate_number=u.`plain_certificate_number` AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, u.certificate_number FROM t_account_bak u, t_account c WHERE u.certificate_number=(SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account WHERE password=?) AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_amount AS amount, u.plain_password AS password, u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak u, `encrypt_ds`.t_account c WHERE u.`plain_certificate_number`=(SELECT plain_certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account WHERE `plain_password`=?) AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, u.certificate_number FROM t_account_bak u, t_account c WHERE (SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account WHERE password=?)=u.certificate_number AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_amount AS amount, u.plain_password AS password, u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak u, `encrypt_ds`.t_account c WHERE (SELECT plain_certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account WHERE `plain_password`=?)=u.`plain_certificate_number` AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM (SELECT ab.certificate_number FROM t_account ab) X

output.sql: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM (SELECT ab.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account ab) X

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, u.certificate_number FROM t_account_bak u, t_account c WHERE (SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account WHERE password=?)=(SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account_bak WHERE password=?) AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_amount AS amount, u.plain_password AS password, u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak u, `encrypt_ds`.t_account c WHERE (SELECT plain_certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account WHERE `plain_password`=?)=(SELECT plain_certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak WHERE `plain_password`=?) AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, u.certificate_number FROM t_account_bak u WHERE EXISTS(SELECT b.certificate_number from t_account b where b.certificate_number=u.certificate_number)

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_amount AS amount, u.plain_password AS password, u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak u WHERE EXISTS(SELECT b.plain_certificate_number from `encrypt_ds`.t_account b where b.`plain_certificate_number`=u.`plain_certificate_number`)

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, u.certificate_number FROM t_account_bak u WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT b.certificate_number from t_account b where b.certificate_number=u.certificate_number)

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_amount AS amount, u.plain_password AS password, u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak u WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT b.plain_certificate_number from `encrypt_ds`.t_account b where b.`plain_certificate_number`=u.`plain_certificate_number`)

input.sql: SELECT u.amount, u.password, u.certificate_number FROM t_account_bak u, t_account c WHERE u.certificate_number IN (SELECT certificate_number FROM t_account WHERE password=?) AND u.password=?

output.sql: SELECT u.plain_amount AS amount, u.plain_password AS password, u.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak u, `encrypt_ds`.t_account c WHERE u.`plain_certificate_number` IN (SELECT plain_certificate_number FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account WHERE `plain_password`=?) AND u.`plain_password`=?

input.sql: SELECT b.certificate_number, b.amount FROM (SELECT a.certificate_number as certificate_number, a.amount FROM t_account a WHERE a.amount = 1373) b

output.sql: SELECT b.certificate_number AS certificate_number, b.amount_CIPHER AS amount FROM (SELECT a.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number, a.`cipher_amount` AS amount_CIPHER FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a WHERE a.`cipher_amount` = 'encrypt_1373') b

input.sql: SELECT out_table.amount FROM t_account out_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT inner_table.amount FROM t_account inner_table)

output.sql: SELECT out_table.cipher_amount AS amount FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account out_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT inner_table.cipher_amount AS amount FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account inner_table)

input.sql: SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM (SELECT a.amount FROM t_account a GROUP BY a.amount DESC ) AS tmp

output.sql: SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM (SELECT a.cipher_amount AS amount_CIPHER FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a GROUP BY a.cipher_amount DESC ) AS tmp

input.sql: SELECT b.* FROM (SELECT a.certificate_number as certificate_number, a.amount FROM t_account a WHERE a.amount = 1373) b

output.sql: SELECT b.certificate_number AS certificate_number, b.amount_CIPHER AS amount FROM (SELECT a.plain_certificate_number AS certificate_number, a.`cipher_amount` AS amount_CIPHER FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a WHERE a.`cipher_amount` = 'encrypt_1373') b

input.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM t_account a) AS temp

output.sql: SELECT temp.`account_id`, temp.`certificate_number` AS `certificate_number`, temp.`password` AS `password`, temp.`amount_CIPHER` AS `amount` FROM (SELECT a.`account_id`, a.`plain_certificate_number` AS `certificate_number`, a.`plain_password` AS `password`, a.`cipher_amount` AS `amount_CIPHER` FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a) AS temp

input.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT a1.* FROM t_account a1 INNER JOIN t_account a2) AS temp

output.sql: SELECT temp.`account_id`, temp.`certificate_number` AS `certificate_number`, temp.`password` AS `password`, temp.`amount_CIPHER` AS `amount` FROM (SELECT a1.`account_id`, a1.`plain_certificate_number` AS `certificate_number`, a1.`plain_password` AS `password`, a1.`cipher_amount` AS `amount_CIPHER` FROM `encrypt_ds`.t_account a1 INNER JOIN `encrypt_ds`.t_account a2) AS temp
